setup.title: X-Dispatch
setup.subtitle: Choose yer X-Plane installation ta get started

loading.title: X-Dispatch
loading.firstLaunch: First voyage — settin' up the ledger...

hints.permissionMac: macOS is blocking file access. Go ta System Settings > Privacy & Security > Files and Folders an' allow X-Dispatch, then restart the app.
hints.permissionWindows: Windows is blocking file access. Right-click X-Dispatch an' choose "Run as administrator", or check the folder permissions in Properties > Security.
hints.permissionLinux: Permission denied. Check that yer user has read access ta the X-Plane folder, or run chmod +r on the file.
hints.fileBusy: The file is locked by another program. Close X-Plane an' any scenery or addon tools, then retry.

messages.firstLaunch: First launch — settin' up the data chest...

tooltips.flightPlan: Load or import a voyage plan
tooltips.simbrief: Import a voyage plan from SimBrief
tooltips.nav: Toggle chart layers round the airport
tooltips.vatsim: Show live VATSIM traffic on the chart
tooltips.weather: Toggle live weather on the chart
tooltips.launch: Set sail from the chosen berth
tooltips.pin: Drop aircraft anywhere on the chart
tooltips.launchSelectPosition: Choose a berth, runway, or drop a mark on the chart

support.reportDescription: Tell us what went awry. Yer app state an' recent actions be bundled in automatically ta help diagnose the trouble.
support.sendSuccess: Ahoy! Yer report be on its way.
support.sendError: Blast. Yer report hit rough seas. Try again.

simbrief.pilotIdHelp: Yer SimBrief Pilot ID (found in yer SimBrief account settings)
simbrief.pilotIdNote: Yer Pilot ID is a numeric identifier. Find it at simbrief.com → Account Settings → Pilot ID.
simbrief.freeService: SimBrief be a free flight-planning service

fmsExportTargets.heading: FMS treasure marks
fmsExportTargets.description: Drop the SimBrief voyage plan straight into yer ship's plan hold.
fmsExportTargets.dialogDescription: Pick the SimBrief format yer addon expects, and the hold it reads from.
fmsExportTargets.label: Mark name
fmsExportTargets.empty: No marks yet, matey. Add one to send SimBrief plans straight into an addon hold.

about.title: Ship's Log
about.description: Flight dispatch an' airport visualization fer X-Plane
about.projectNotice: A passion-fueled project fer the X-Plane crew, shared free o' charge and built in the open.
about.dataStorageDescription: App preferences, cache, an' database are stored here.
about.crashReportsDescription: Help improve X-Dispatch by sendin' wreck reports automatically
about.crashReportsNote: Restart required fer changes ta take effect. No personal data is collected.
about.independenceNotice: X-Dispatch be an independent community project, with no affiliation or endorsement from X-Plane, SimBrief, Navigraph, VATSIM, or IVAO.
about.debugShortcut: Ye can also use Ctrl+Shift+D (Cmd+Shift+D on Mac)

xplane.title: X-Plane Install
xplane.closeOnLaunchDescription: Close X-Dispatch once X-Plane gets under way
xplane.name: Label
xplane.namePlaceholder: e.g. Beta hold, clean install, modded
xplane.launchArgsDescription: Extra command line arguments passed ta X-Plane on every cold start
xplane.launchArgsSessionSubtext: Set via --xp-arg, fer this voyage only

appearance.title: Look & Trim
appearance.mapStyleDescription: Choose a map style fer the background
appearance.customStyleHint: Paste a MapLibre style URL (e.g. https://tiles.openfreemap.org/styles/liberty) or a raster tile chart pattern (e.g. https://tile.openstreetmap.org/{z}/{x}/{y}.png).
appearance.fontSizeDescription: Set the size o' the interface text
appearance.idleOrbitDescription: Slowly circle the chosen airport after idle time
appearance.zoomLevelDescription: Scale the whole interface up or down

graphics.title: Visual Rigging
graphics.mapStyleDescription: Choose a map style fer the background
graphics.customStyleHint: Paste a MapLibre style.json URL, or a raster tile chart pattern wit' {{placeholder}}.

mapStyleError.insecure-protocol: URL must use https:// (or http://localhost fer dev)
mapStyleError.unsupported-format: URL must be a MapLibre style.json or a raster tile pattern wit' {{placeholder}}

graphics.terrain3dDesc: Mountains rise off the chart when ye zoom in.
graphics.terrainShadingDesc: Shading an' contour lines so mountains look better.
graphics.surfaceDetailDesc: Curve smoothness fer taxiway an' pavement edges
graphics.lightsPerfHint: Turn these off ta improve performance.
graphics.dayNightDesc: Live day/night shadow across the globe
graphics.contoursDesc: Elevation contour lines across the terrain

navigation.title: Charting
navigation.dataDescription: View the loaded chart data sources
navigation.navigraphInfo: Navigraph data provides enhanced navigation data including updated airways, procedures, an' frequencies.
navigation.airportLayoutDescription: Airfield geometry from apt.dat files (runways, taxiways, gates, etc.)
navigation.navDataSourceDescription: Navaids, waypoints, airways, procedures, an' frequencies
navigation.cacheDescription: Clear cached data ta force a full reload from X-Plane files

vatsim.title: VATSIM
vatsim.sectionDescription: Live traffic from the VATSIM network
vatsim.description: Show live pilot positions on the chart
vatsim.refreshNote: VATSIM data is refreshed every 15 seconds ta comply wit' API guidelines.
vatsim.aboutDescription: Pilots are displayed as icons on the map. Click on a pilot ta see their flight details including callsign, aircraft, departure, an' destination.
vatsim.refreshHelp: How often ta refresh VATSIM data (recommended: 15s)

companionApps.title: Companion Mateys
companionApps.description: Programs to set sail alongside X-Plane (XPME, ATC chatterboxes, helm-riggin' drivers).
companionApps.empty: No companion mateys signed on yet.
companionApps.notElevatedTitle: X-Dispatch ain't sailin' under the captain's flag
companionApps.notElevatedHint: Companion apps won't start. Right-click X-Dispatch and choose Run as administrator (Windows), or relaunch from a terminal with sudo (macOS/Linux), ye scallywag.

error.needsAdmin: X-Dispatch needs the captain's flag to start this app
error.fileMissing: Couldn't find the executable at the configured path

logs.title: X-Plane cap'n's logs
logs.description: Read th' Log.txt scroll t' see what th' sim hollered during yer last voyage.
logs.truncatedNotice: Showin' th' last {{shownMb}} MB of a {{totalMb}} MB scroll, savvy?

empty.noPathCta: Set yer course in X-Plane settings
empty.noLog: No scroll yet — has th' sim ever set sail on this rig?
empty.allClear: Th' bilge be clean — nothin' flagged in this scroll.
empty.noMatches: No entries match yer filter, matey.

vatsim.notEnabled: Enable VATSIM in settings ta see live data

airportInfo.noGatewayData: NO GATEWAY INTEL FER THIS AIRPORT
airportInfo.gatewayDescription: This data shows submissions fer this airport.

flightStrip.centerTooltip: Center the chart on yer aircraft

debug.title: Debug Spyglass Active
debug.instruction: Click any feature on the chart ta inspect its details.

launcher.title: Voyage Setup
launcher.xplaneRunning: X-Plane be runnin' — the flight'll change via API
launcher.selectDeparture: Choose a departure berth on the chart
launcher.spawnErrorAccess: Windows scuttled th’ launch, matey. Right-click X-Dispatch and choose „Run as administrator“, then hoist th’ sails again.
launcher.spawnErrorMissing: Couldn’	 find X-Plane at th’ configured course. Check th’ X-Plane install path in Settings.
launcher.spawnErrorGeneric: X-Plane refused to launch, arr. Check th’ log fer clues (Settings → Logs).

weatherDialog.title: Sky Conditions
weatherDialog.emptyHint: Click a cloud or wind layer in the diagram ta edit

logbook.title: Captain's Log
logbook.emptyHint: Yer last 10 flights will appear here after launching

dropZone.title: Drop cargo ta install
dropZone.subtitle: ZIP, 7z, or RAR cargo
dropZone.ariaLabel: Drop or click ta choose addon archive files

installer.successHint: Yer addons are ready ta use
installer.supportedTypes: Aircraft, plugins, scenery, liveries, an' more

scenery.loadingHint: This may take a moment fer large installations
scenery.deleteDescription: Permanently scuttle "{{name}}" from disk? This cannot be undone.
scenery.safeModeOn: Drag restricted ta same category. Turn off ta freely reorder (advanced).
scenery.safeModeOff: Free reorder enabled. Items can be dragged across categories - use wit' caution!
scenery.priorityHint: Entries at the top override those below. Drag ta reorder or use Auto Sort.
scenery.dragHintSafe: Drag ta reorder within the same category. Changes are saved when ye click Save Order.
scenery.dragHintUnsafe: Safe mode OFF - Ye can drag items across categories. This may cause scenery issues if done incorrectly.
scenery.backupsDescription: Restore a previous version o' scenery_packs.ini
scenery.noBackups: No backups available yet. Backups are created automatically when ye save changes.

liveryDialog.title: Paint Schemes
liveryDialog.confirmDelete: Scuttle livery "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.

scriptsDialog.title: Lua script scrolls
scriptsDialog.subtitle: FlyWithLua script locker
scriptsDialog.confirmDelete: Scuttle script "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.

export.heading: Send ta FMS
export.emptyHint: No export marks set. Add one at Settings → SimBrief, ye scallywag.
export.noMatches: None o' yer formats be in this SimBrief plan.

simbrief.title: SimBrief Import
simbrief.description: Fetch yer latest flight plan from SimBrief
simbrief.configurePilotId: Rig yer Pilot ID in Settings → SimBrief
simbrief.clickToFetch: Click below ta haul in yer latest flight plan

briefing.sigmetsDesc: Significant weather warnings along yer route — turbulence, icing, thunderstorms, etc.
briefing.noSigmets: No foul weather warnings on this route
briefing.firDesc: Air traffic control regions yer flight passes through
briefing.notamsDesc: Notices ta airmen — airport closures, runway changes, an' other operational alerts
briefing.transAltDesc: Altitude where ye switch between local altimeter (QNH) an' standard pressure (STD) — set yer altimeter accordingly

errorBoundary.title: Something went sideways
errorBoundary.description: An unexpected error struck. Try again or reload the app.
